home_page.description: Currently, I'm a final-year student majoring in IT at Posts and Telecommunications Institute of Technology. I'm passionate about DIY products/solutions and IoT in general, implementing IoT projects from hardware to software is a joy for me.

bio: Glad you are here! So, my name is Thanh (full name is Ma Quyet Thanh). Currently, I'm a final-year student majoring in IT at the Posts and Telecommunications Institute of Technology (PTIT).

I started learning about hardware and embedded systems back in 2020 (just with Arduino and VEX IQ kits), then I moved to college and had more opportunities to work on hardware and IoT projects (although I major in IT, I have a strong passion for hardware and IoT).

For me, IoT is not just a field to learn but a playground: putting hardware together with software to get data running from tiny MCUs up to the user interface and seeing everything working smoothly is the best feeling.

I also have a passion for DIY products and solutions. I enjoy building things that not only involve hardware but also integrate AI, mobile apps, and web interfaces to make them more useful and fun to use.

In the short term, I aim to become an Fullstack Developer in the field of Embedded & IoT. Moving forward, I plan to specialize in AUTOSAR and automotive software (or even robotics - it's depending on the opportunities that come my way).

journey.title: My Journey
journey.subtitle: The milestones and projects that got me here.

high_school.title: 🏫 High School
high_school.organization: Tuyen Quang Ethnic Boarding High School
high_school.description: Member of the STEM Robotics club, started learning Arduino during summer of 10th grade and later worked with VEX IQ robotics, which was the beginning of my passion for hardware and IoT.

ptit.title: 💼 Information Technology
ptit.organization: Posts and Telecommunications Institute of Technology (PTIT)
ptit.description: Final-year IT student, focusing on information systems design and distributed systems. Alongside that, I spend time learning more about electronics and telecommunications in embedded systems.

kidscode.title: STEM Teacher + Web Developer
kidscode.description: Teaching basic programming and robotics to students at the center, involved in curriculum development and organizing extracurricular activities to foster interest in STEM through hands-on projects and interactive lessons. Same time, I also participated in developing and maintaining the center's e-commerce website on the Sapo platform using Liquid.

partime_teacher.title: Part-time Teacher
partime_teacher.description: Teaching programming (for ViSEF) and robotics (for competitions) to students in my free time. I also working as a mentor in the STEM club of some high schools like: TH School, Dan Phuong High School, etc.

stemvn.title: Hardware/Software Full-Stack Developer
stemvn.description: Developing and maintaining software projects related to STEM educational robots and LAB equipment. Developing and maintaining the company's e-commerce website on the Sapo platform using Liquid. Developing data crawling tools and workflow automation to improve the company's operational efficiency.

freelancer.title: Freelancer
freelancer.description: I am currently working as a freelancer, providing software development and IoT solutions. I also offer services in 3D design and printing, PCB design and manufacturing, CNC machining, and other DIY and IoT projects for clients. During this time, I am also learning more about other knowledge such as STM32 (low-level programming), embedded toolchains (ARM GCC, GDB, OpenOCD, ESP-IDF), AUTOSAR, etc... to prepare for new opportunities in the future.

cta.title: Want to see what I'm building or work together?

skills.title: What skills do I have?
skills.subtitle: Skills I have accumulated through my projects and work experience.

communication.name: Communication
communication.description: Thanks to my freelance work, I have developed strong communication skills, allowing me to convey ideas and information clearly. I am also a good listener, understanding the needs of others and providing appropriate solutions.

problem-solving.name: Problem Solving
problem-solving.description: This skill allows me to analyze problems, identify root causes, and develop effective solutions, especially when debugging software and hardware issues.

adaptability.name: Adaptability
adaptability.description: I am highly adaptable and can quickly adjust to new situations, technologies, and environments. I am open to learning new skills and embracing change.

cad-cam.name: CAD/CAM
cad-cam.description: I have experience using CAD/CAM software and CNC machines to design and manufacture mechanical parts based on 3D models or even create PCBs. I can create 3D models, generate toolpaths, and optimize designs for manufacturing processes.

3d-design.name: 3D Design
3d-design.description: I can use 3D modeling software to create accurate and detailed designs based on existing technical drawings or design them from scratch according to requirements.

pcb-design.name: PCB Design
pcb-design.description: I have experience in designing printed circuit boards (PCBs) for various applications. I can create schematics, layout components, and ensure proper electrical performance and manufacturability.

clean-code.name: Clean Code
clean-code.description: I follow best practices for writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code. I prioritize readability, modularity, and reusability in my code to ensure long-term maintainability.
